ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "event" TEXT /* Name of the competition event (e.g., SBD) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the competition (e.g., Single-ply, Multi-ply) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the competition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the competition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the competition (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (e.g., M, F) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Current weight of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_class_kg" REAL /* Weight class in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type (e.g., Single-ply, Multi-ply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement of the athlete in the competition */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the athlete */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the division */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards or recognitions received by the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_comp_id FOREIGN KEY ("comp_id") REFERENCES competitions ("comp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Official, Coach, Athlete) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Official, Coach, Athlete) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Name of the competition event (e.g., SBD)
Format of the competition (e.g., Single-ply, Multi-ply)

Any awards or recognitions received by the athlete
